LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF LOIS DECASTRO'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER TO RETURN PATHOLOGY SLIDES - DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO RETURN ALL PATHOLOGY SLIDES IN ITS POSSESSION OR CONTROL CREATED FROM DECEDENT'S LIVER TISSUE TO KAISER PERMANENTE'S PATHOLOGY DEPARTMENT OR TO DELIVER THEM TO AN ALTERNATE NEUTRAL, THIRD PARTY FACILITY AGREED TO BY THE PARTIES WITHIN 10 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. THAT NEITHER PARTY WILL ACCESS THESE SLIDES WITHOUT ADVANCE NOTICE TO THE OTHER PARTY ONCE THEY ARE DEPOSITED WITH THE THIRD-PARTY. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For An Order To Return Pathology Slides
Off Calendar Oct-04-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. GREGORY P. WATERS OF THE LAW OFFICES OF ENGSTROM, LIPSCOMB & LACK, TEL. NO. (310) 552-3800 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. PATRICK S. THOMPSON OF THE GOODWIN/PROCTER, TEL. NO. 733-6000 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF LOIS DECASTRO'S Motion For An Order To Return Pathology Slides - Defendant is ordered to return all pathology slides in its possession or control created from decedent's liver tissue to Kaiser Permanente's Pathology Department or to deliver them to an alternate neutral, third party facility agreed to by the parties within 10 days of notice of entry of this order. That neither party will access these slides without advance notice to the other party once they are deposited with the third-party. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/PJB)
